ques: Browse Coursera for Business and Coursera for Teams and summarise some of their advantages.
answer: Coursera for Business is the full enterprise platform — 20,000+ courses and 200+ certificates from 325+ partners (Stanford, Google, IBM), AI-accelerated learning (personalized guidance, role-play simulations, Claude/Copilot/ChatGPT integrations), role-based learning paths, measurable proficiency, admin dashboards/analytics, and scalable plans up to Enterprise (SSO/API/LMS integrations + dedicated success manager). Coursera for Teams is its self-service plan for 2–499 learners: same-day setup, full 12,000+ course library and Professional Certificates, AI-powered customizable multilingual learning paths, progress tracking, and flexible low-commitment terms (transparent pricing, quarterly/annual billing, license transfers, prorated add-ons, volume discounts, 14-day refund) — citing 25% more productivity, 38% higher retention, and 97% training engagement.
